message:
feat(core,db): add agent search filter and optimize cache locking

Add `agent` field to SearchFilter that matches sender OR recipient,
distinct from `sender` which only matches the sender. SearchQuery's
to_filter() now uses `agent` for Inbox/no-direction queries and
`sender` only for Outbox direction.

Rewrite unresolved_result_matches_agent_filter() to check sender plus
all recipients (to/cc/bcc) with case-insensitive matching, respecting
direction context.

Refactor ReadCache get_inbox_stats_scoped() from a single write-lock
to a two-phase read-then-write pattern, reducing lock contention on
the stats cache.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
